title: pjson as a thin wrapper around pmm
description: pjson must be a specific JSON wrapper around pmm, delegating all memory management, persistence, and low-level data structure operations to pmm. pjson should not re-implement functionality already provided by pmm.
rationale: Avoiding duplication between pjson and pmm keeps the codebase maintainable and ensures that improvements to pmm automatically benefit pjson.
author: netkeep80
acceptance_criteria: pjson uses pmm's pptr, pmap, pvector/parray, pstring, pstringview directly
No memory management code is duplicated in pjson
pjson compiles as a header-only library depending only on pmm
